message:
fix(cass): update CLI invocation to match CASS v0.2.1 interface

Move query arg after flags with `--` separator and replace deprecated
`--days` flag with `--since=<N>d` across all three CASS invocation
paths (cass/inject, robot/cass_inject, tools/cass).

Fixes #89

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
